summary: Sanity check verification for AgentERP completed. All backend APIs (25 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Tool builder CRUD operations, tool execution with table display, Analytics Dashboard, and Chat functionality all verified.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/health returns connected status with live ERP mode
Backend: /api/tools GET returns list of 4 saved tools
Backend: /api/tools POST creates new tool with filters parsed from prompt
Backend: /api/tools/run/{tool_name} executes tool and returns data
Backend: /api/chat/sessions GET returns chat sessions list
Backend: /api/chat endpoint processes AI messages and returns dashboard data
Frontend: Main page loads with sidebar showing tools and quick actions
Frontend: Create Tool modal opens with form fields (name, doctype, prompt)
Frontend: Create Tool modal closes correctly (X button and click outside)
Frontend: Running high_value_orders tool displays results in table format
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard displays KPIs and data tables (Orders, Invoices)
Frontend: New Chat button creates new chat session
Frontend: Chat input sends message and receives AI response with dashboard widget
Console: No 'Response body is already used' error in browser console
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Frontend uses axios (not fetch), which was confirmed - no Response body error possible from app code
Good: Tool builder correctly parses natural language prompts to ERPNext filters
Good: All 4 saved tools (high_value_orders, pending_orders, active_customers, todays_orders) execute successfully
Good: Tool results display in proper table format with columns: Name, Customer, Grand Total, Status, Actions
test_credentials: None required - using live ERPNext credentials from backend/.env
seed_data_creation: None - using live ERPNext data with 4 existing saved tools
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Backend has 2 test files: test_agenterp_api.py (12 tests) and test_tool_builder.py (13 tests). Live ERPNext at india-next.m.frappe.cloud. 4 saved tools exist: high_value_orders, pending_orders, active_customers, todays_orders. Frontend uses axios for API calls - no fetch-related errors possible.
